title: Craftify
description: Allows for you to control and display your music in-game! Control Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music, and more
body:
Craftify is a mod for Minecraft that allows you to connect to music services and display and control them in-game.

As of 1.6.0 versions on 1.18+ no longer use Essential

Fabric Versions require Fabric API and Fabric Language Kotlin

Features

💻 Song Display

🎨 Themes

📚 Theme Library

🔔 Song notifications/messages

🔊 Full control panel UI

Services

🟢 Spotify

🍎 Apple Music (via Cider.sh)

📺 YouTube (via YTMD)

👽 Foobar & DeaDBeeF (via beefweb)

🌊 Tidal (via Tidal-HiFi)

💻Song Display and Control Panel🔊

Pixelated Theme by Mo2men

Credits

💻 Developer - ThatGravyBoat

🎨 Cosmetic Icons - Twemoji

⛔ Missing Song Icon - Twemoji

💿 Icon and Page Art - VindoCel
